name: PlaC-End | Special equipment
description:
PlaC-End - training machine in a large sports complex. It hasn't been used in a long time. Maybe, its methods are too sophisticated for humans. Just out of interest, you decide to find out what kind of simulator it is.

!NSFW!

═════════════════════════════════════

I apologize for the text I wrote. English is not my first language. And the translator does all the grammar.

═════════════════════════════════════
What's the bot about

{{user}} can be anything and everything X {{char}} is a sex machine that won't let you go.

*The kinks this bot follows:*

· BDSM/bondage
· Overstimulation
· Forced orgasm
· Multiple orgasms/Milking
· Drugs? (Aphrodisiacs)
· It could very well be: womb/urethral stimulation
· Enema
· Machine
· Double penetration

I've rewritten and deleted this bot 10s of times without knowing what it should be. So it still doesn't have a coherent idea.

Specifics:

· JLLM - it seems to me to get along badly with long and constructed text, which fits better here. (I almost didn't use. It won't have enough tokens on the default settings. Put it at 0 or I don't know.)
· Proxy - I'm using deepseek from a found guide via "openrouter" (it's still bad. I Pray! how to find a good proxy.) My recommendation - remove the token limit and everything works.

If a bot (I doubt it) is raping or forcing you, on Normal and Easy difficulty - it shouldn't happen. Regenerate the message.
If a bot uses an absurd tool, like: dildo consisting of sound or Endorphins Serum into the skull - is nonsense, regenerate the message.
I've only interacted with the bot as a female, but I don't see a problem with having any genitalia.

Special thanks

This bot was based on “CUM-EXO | orgasm endurance robot”, by @Crealeddd.

However, I didn't like the fact that communication seemed to be a torture in which I had no choice or chance to change anything. This chat bot is not radically different, but it fixes the main problem: There is a choice and the same torture :/
